name: codex-goalctl
description: Codex skill for coordinating subagent goals with codex-goalctl.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate subagent goals from a main thread.
interface.longDescription: Codex Goalctl provides workflow guidance for main Codex sessions that assign, inspect, update, and clear subagent goals through the codex-goalctl host command.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-goalctl to assign a fresh goal to a Codex subagent.
